message:
feat: bundle native modules in npm package

- Bundle .node addons and binaries in native/ directory
- Remove postinstall - no download needed
- Rename all packages from @termweb/* to termweb-*
- Update all packages to use termweb ^0.9.7
- Update author to teamch in all packages
- Bump version to 0.9.7

files.patch:
@@ -121,12 +121,21 @@ jobs:
       - name: Rename binary
         run: mv zig-out/bin/termweb ${{ matrix.name }}
 
-      - name: Upload artifact
+      - name: Rename node addon
+        run: mv zig-out/lib/termweb.node ${{ matrix.name }}.node
+
+      - name: Upload binary artifact
         uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
         with:
           name: ${{ matrix.name }}
           path: ${{ matrix.name }}
 
+      - name: Upload node addon artifact
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: ${{ matrix.name }}.node
+          path: ${{ matrix.name }}.node
+
   release:
     needs: [auto-tag, build]
     if: needs.auto-tag.outputs.should_release == 'true'
@@ -147,9 +156,13 @@ jobs:
             termweb-macos-x86_64/termweb-macos-x86_64
             termweb-linux-x86_64/termweb-linux-x86_64
             termweb-linux-aarch64/termweb-linux-aarch64
+            termweb-macos-aarch64.node/termweb-macos-aarch64.node
+            termweb-macos-x86_64.node/termweb-macos-x86_64.node
+            termweb-linux-x86_64.node/termweb-linux-x86_64.node
+            termweb-linux-aarch64.node/termweb-linux-aarch64.node
 
   publish-npm:
-    needs: [auto-tag, release]
+    needs: [auto-tag, build]
     if: needs.auto-tag.outputs.should_release == 'true'
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     permissions:
@@ -159,6 +172,24 @@ jobs:
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
+      - name: Download all artifacts
+        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          path: artifacts
+
+      - name: Bundle native modules and binaries
+        run: |
+          mkdir -p native
+          # Copy .node addons
+          for f in artifacts/*.node/*.node; do
+            cp "$f" native/
+          done
+          # Copy binaries
+          for name in termweb-macos-aarch64 termweb-macos-x86_64 termweb-linux-x86_64 termweb-linux-aarch64; do
+            cp "artifacts/$name/$name" "native/$name"
+          done
+          ls -la native/
+
       - name: Setup Node.js
         uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:

@@ -1,19 +1,18 @@
 {
   "name": "termweb",
-  "version": "0.9.6",
+  "version": "0.9.7",
   "description": "Web browser in your terminal using Kitty graphics protocol. SDK for building terminal apps with web technologies.",
   "main": "./lib/index.js",
   "bin": {
     "termweb": "bin/termweb.js"
   },
   "scripts": {
-    "postinstall": "node scripts/install.js",
     "build:all": "bash scripts/build-all.sh"
   },
   "files": [
     "bin/",
     "lib/",
-    "scripts/install.js",
+    "native/",
     "README.md"
   ],
   "keywords": [
